scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:open:android: npm run build && npx cap sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:open:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:build:android: npm run build && npx cap sync && npx cap build android
scripts.cap:build:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync && npx cap build ios
scripts.mobile:build: npm run build && npx cap sync
